news.title: Iconische karaokebar Bonaparte in Antwerpen heet vanaf vandaag Bar België: “Ik hoop dat we onze nieuwe naam tot 19 juli kunnen behouden” - HLN
news.summary:
# Summary

Antwerp's iconic karaoke bar Bonaparte has temporarily renamed itself to "Bar België" (Bar Belgium) as of today, with plans to keep the new name until July 19th. The owner hopes to maintain this temporary name change for the duration of the specified period. Visitors to Antwerp looking for a notable karaoke venue should be aware of this name change to find the bar during their visit.
